steps.title: Substitute the input
steps.content:
The notation $h(-6)$ asks for the output of the function when the input is $-6$. Replace $x$ with $-6$ in the expression.
$$h(-6)=7|-6|$$

steps.title: Evaluate the absolute value
steps.content: The absolute value of $-6$ is $6$ because absolute value gives distance from $0$. Then multiply by $7$. $$7|-6|=7(6)=42$$ The answer is D.
